subject: A baker in a rustic kitchen holding a long-handled peel beside a large lattice-top pie on a wooden table
description: A warmly-lit cottage kitchen scene dominated by a large golden-brown lattice-top pie in the foreground, sitting on a dark wooden table or counter. Behind the pie stands a humanoid figure — a baker or cook — wearing a rolled-sleeved tunic and apron, holding a long wooden peel or paddle propped over one shoulder. Wooden shelving and pantry stock fill the background, and a hearth or stove glow warms the right side of the frame with amber light. The mood is hearth-cozy on its surface, but the card title and the baker's posture lend a quietly sinister fairytale undertone — the pie may not be ordinary fare.
foreground: Large lattice-top pie on a dark wooden surface
background: Rustic kitchen interior with wooden shelves, pantry goods, and warm hearth light
emotion: calm composure with a knowing, wry undertone
